title: Axolotl illagers
description: This texture pack changes illagers into axolotls !
body:
![Axolotl Illagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fCflmIou/images/478c5cf6ddd826b00da3130ac659b42780024a55.png 'Axolotl Illagers')

This texture pack changes pillagers, evokers, vindicators and witches into axolotls!

optifine/Entity Model Features required

<details>
<summary>Recommended texture packs</summary>

Recommended texture packs to use with _Axolotl illagers_

[Axolotl Villagers by Raphaxolotlz (me)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-villagers)

[Axolotl Illagers SFX by enenoir](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-illagers-sfx)

</details>
